Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Find all lines containing "duty officer for"

args.command: echo -n "Falstead=Rena Voss watch|Greylock=Pavel Otun watch|Hallow=Imara Telk watch|Idrigil=Sten Vorak watch|Jorrith=Wren Klost watch" | shasum -a 1
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the joined string

args.command: python3 -c "import hashlib; s = 'Falstead=Rena Voss watch|Greylock=Pavel Otun watch|Hallow=Imara Telk watch|Idrigil=Sten Vorak watch|Jorrith=Wren Klost watch'; print(hashlib.sha1(s.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest())"
args.description: Compute SHA-1 using Python to verify
